TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Charles Barkley kawas te 1963, byacing te 2 ru 20 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Alabama, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 114 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia squliq ka 76ers. lalu nya ga mhetung son nha, ana rroq qu inrkyasan nya ga, lokah balay qmol mari, nanu yasa ssyan nha mrhuw pqol mari, ru baqun kwara squliq mha hopa balay nqwaq nya pinqzyu. qutux ke' nya ini nha zngi ga, kun ga spzyang motux na ppzuy mari, Michael Jeffrey Jordan hiya ga squliq ka minkahul te binah na cinbwanan. tensu pinni'an nya 23757 ginnagal nya tensu (22.1 pasento pinni'an nya.) 12546 qnol nya mari (11.7 pasento pinni'an nya mari) 4215 rnaw nya (3.9 pasento pinni'an nya mari.) mnanak pinzi'an nya mari mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal. 50 spzyang kinhopa squliq ka ppzuy mari na NBA, mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal raykuse. minsazing magal champion na Olympic Games(1992. 1996), champion na Amerika(1992). spzyang blaq na squliq ppzuy mari(1991) minmagal magal NBA lahuy te qutux, minmagal magal NBA lahuy te sazing, kawas te 1996 magal NBA lahuy te cyugal. kawas 1985, spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, kawas te 1987, squliq ka spzyang baq qmol mari, bango na lukus nya 34, wal galun kineng na Phoenix Suns ru Philadelphia 76ers. bniru zzyaw nya kawas te 1984, mzyup squ NBA, t'aring mnanak qnxan nya ppzuy mari. mtnaq kawas qasa galun nha squ pzyang blaq lahuy na NBA. kawas te 1985, mzyup squ NBA te sazing lahuy. kwasa te 1986-1987 mrhuw nqu qnol mari(14.6 pasento pinni'an nya mari) te qutux mzyup minsing lahuy. kawas te 1987-1988, kawas1988, byacing 12, ryax 30, 41 bun qu nagal nya ru 22 qnol nya mari, 5 rnaw nya ru 6 qu qnol nya mari, hiya qu wal smi lalu nqu 40-20-5-5, kawas qasa mzyup squ NBA te qutux lahuy. kawas te 1988-1989, pinspung squ minsing, 17 bun qu nagal nya, 22 qnol nya mari(qasa ga pzyang pzyux nagal na minsing pinspngan) ru m'MVP na minsing pinspung. magal te sazing na spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari. kawas te 1992-1993, tbirun nha sa Phoenix Suns, kawas qasa magal spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, hiya ga te cyugal squliq ka tbirun nha te binah lahuy pzuy mari ru magal MVP. ru maras gluw nya mzyup squ pspngan na champion, te payat pinspung magal tasanyan, ana ga, yaqih cikay utux nya, wayal slaqux na Michael Jeffrey Jordan ka lahuy Chicago Bulls. kawas te 1996, tmwang sa lahuy na Houston Rockets, t'aring pspung mari qasa ga, 33 qnol nya mari(yasa pzyang pzyux qnol nya) kawas te 1997-1998, squliq ka te sazing 23000 bun qu nagal nya, 12000 qnol nya mari ru 4000 qu rnaw nya. kawas te 1999-2000, squzi nya yamil nya ru lukus nya aring kya mhngaw pinnzuy nya mari la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßarles~…ē ő≤arklej kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a alaő≤ama, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu pńßila*elpńßia s~…ēquliq ka **ers~…ē. lalu nja …£a mńßetuŇč s~…ēon nńßa, ana rroq qu inrkjas~…ēan nja …£a, lokańß ő≤alaj qmol mari, nanu jas~…ēa s~…ēs~…ējan nńßa mrńßuw pqol mari, ru ő≤aqun kwara s~…ēquliq mńßa ńßopa ő≤alaj nqwaq nja pinqzju. qutux ke Ē nja ini nńßa zŇči …£a, kun …£a s~…ēpzjaŇč motux na ppzuj mari, mi ¶~ ®ńßael *e**rej *or*an ńßija …£a s~…ēquliq ka minkańßul te ő≤inańß na ¶~ ®inő≤wanan. tens~…ēu pinni Ēan nja ***** …£inna…£al nja tens~…ēu (**.* pas~…ēento pinni Ēan nja.) ***** qnol nja mari (**.* pas~…ēento pinni Ēan nja mari) **** rnaw nja (*.* pas~…ēento pinni Ēan nja mari.) mnanak pinzi Ēan nja mari mzjup s~…ēqu ő≤ink…£an pinkineŇč nńßa Ňčas~…ēal. ** s~…ēpzjaŇč kinńßopa s~…ēquliq ka ppzuj mari na nő≤a, mzjup s~…ēqu ő≤ink…£an pinkineŇč nńßa Ňčas~…ēal rajkus~…ēe. mins~…ēaziŇč ma…£al ¶~ ®ńßampion na oljmpi ¶~ ® …£ames~…ē(****. ****), ¶~ ®ńßampion na amerika(****). s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na s~…ēquliq ppzuj mari(****) minma…£al ma…£al nő≤a lańßuj te qutux, minma…£al ma…£al nő≤a lańßuj te s~…ēaziŇč, kawas~…ē te **** ma…£al nő≤a lańßuj te ¶~ ®ju…£al. kawas~…ē ****, s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari, kawas~…ē te ****, s~…ēquliq ka s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤aq qmol mari, ő≤aŇčo na lukus~…ē nja **, wal …£alun kineŇč na pńßoenix s~…ēuns~…ē ru pńßila*elpńßia **ers~…ē. ő≤niru zzjaw nja kawas~…ē te ****, mzjup s~…ēqu nő≤a, t ĒariŇč mnanak qnxan nja ppzuj mari. mtnaq kawas~…ē qas~…ēa …£alun nńßa s~…ēqu pzjaŇč ő≤laq lańßuj na nő≤a. kawas~…ē te ****, mzjup s~…ēqu nő≤a te s~…ēaziŇč lańßuj. kwas~…ēa te ****-**** mrńßuw nqu qnol mari(**.* pas~…ēento pinni Ēan nja mari) te qutux mzjup mins~…ēiŇč lańßuj. kawas~…ē te ****-****, kawas~…ē****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč **, rjax **, ** ő≤un qu na…£al nja ru ** qnol nja mari, * rnaw nja ru * qu qnol nja mari, ńßija qu wal s~…ēmi lalu nqu **-**-*-*, kawas~…ē qas~…ēa mzjup s~…ēqu nő≤a te qutux lańßuj. kawas~…ē te ****-****, pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ēqu mins~…ēiŇč, ** ő≤un qu na…£al nja, ** qnol nja mari(qas~…ēa …£a pzjaŇč pzjux na…£al na mins~…ēiŇč pins~…ēpŇčan) ru m Ēm*p na mins~…ēiŇč pins~…ēpuŇč. ma…£al te s~…ēaziŇč na s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari. kawas~…ē te ****-****, tő≤irun nńßa s~…ēa pńßoenix s~…ēuns~…ē, kawas~…ē qas~…ēa ma…£al s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari, ńßija …£a te ¶~ ®ju…£al s~…ēquliq ka tő≤irun nńßa te ő≤inańß lańßuj pzuj mari ru ma…£al m*p. ru maras~…ē …£luw nja mzjup s~…ēqu ps~…ēpŇčan na ¶~ ®ńßampion, te pajat pins~…ēpuŇč ma…£al tas~…ēanjan, ana …£a, jaqińß ¶~ ®ikaj utux nja, wajal s~…ēlaqux na mi ¶~ ®ńßael *e**rej *or*an ka lańßuj ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o ő≤ulls~…ē. kawas~…ē te ****, tmwaŇč s~…ēa lańßuj na nja mari ru **** qu rnaw nja. kawas~…ē te ****-****, s~…ēquzi nja jamil nja ru lukus~…ē nja ariŇč kja mńßŇčaw pinnzuj nja mari la. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Charles Barkley kawas te 1963, byacing te 2 ru 20 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Alabama, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 114 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia squliq ka 76ers. lalu nya ga mhetung son nha, ana rroq qu inrkyasan nya ga, lokah balay qmol mari, nanu yasa ssyan nha mrhuw pqol mari, ru baqun kwara squliq mha hopa balay nqwaq nya pinqzyu. qutux ke' nya ini nha zngi ga, kun ga spzyang motux na ppzuy mari, Michael Jeffrey Jordan hiya ga squliq ka minkahul te binah na cinbwanan. tensu pinni'an nya 23757 ginnagal nya tensu (22.1 pasento pinni'an nya.) 12546 qnol nya mari (11.7 pasento pinni'an nya mari) 4215 rnaw nya (3.9 pasento pinni'an nya mari.) mnanak pinzi'an nya mari mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal. 50 spzyang kinhopa squliq ka ppzuy mari na NBA, mzyup squ binkgan pinkineng nha ngasal raykuse. minsazing magal champion na Olympic Games(1992. 1996), champion na Amerika(1992). spzyang blaq na squliq ppzuy mari(1991) minmagal magal NBA lahuy te qutux, minmagal magal NBA lahuy te sazing, kawas te 1996 magal NBA lahuy te cyugal. kawas 1985, spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, kawas te 1987, squliq ka spzyang baq qmol mari, bango na lukus nya 34, wal galun kineng na Phoenix Suns ru Philadelphia 76ers. bniru zzyaw nya kawas te 1984, mzyup squ NBA, t'aring mnanak qnxan nya ppzuy mari. mtnaq kawas qasa galun nha squ pzyang blaq lahuy na NBA. kawas te 1985, mzyup squ NBA te sazing lahuy. kwasa te 1986-1987 mrhuw nqu qnol mari(14.6 pasento pinni'an nya mari) te qutux mzyup minsing lahuy. kawas te 1987-1988, kawas1988, byacing 12, ryax 30, 41 bun qu nagal nya ru 22 qnol nya mari, 5 rnaw nya ru 6 qu qnol nya mari, hiya qu wal smi lalu nqu 40-20-5-5, kawas qasa mzyup squ NBA te qutux lahuy. kawas te 1988-1989, pinspung squ minsing, 17 bun qu nagal nya, 22 qnol nya mari(qasa ga pzyang pzyux nagal na minsing pinspngan) ru m'MVP na minsing pinspung. magal te sazing na spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari. kawas te 1992-1993, tbirun nha sa Phoenix Suns, kawas qasa magal spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari, hiya ga te cyugal squliq ka tbirun nha te binah lahuy pzuy mari ru magal MVP. ru maras gluw nya mzyup squ pspngan na champion, te payat pinspung magal tasanyan, ana ga, yaqih cikay utux nya, wayal slaqux na Michael Jeffrey Jordan ka lahuy Chicago Bulls. kawas te 1996, tmwang sa lahuy na Houston Rockets, t'aring pspung mari qasa ga, 33 qnol nya mari(yasa pzyang pzyux qnol nya) kawas te 1997-1998, squliq ka te sazing 23000 bun qu nagal nya, 12000 qnol nya mari ru 4000 qu rnaw nya. kawas te 1999-2000, squzi nya yamil nya ru lukus nya aring kya mhngaw pinnzuy nya mari la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

minma…£al ma…£al nő≤a lańßuj te s~…ēaziŇč, kawas~…ē te **** ma…£al nő≤a lańßuj te ¶~ ®ju…£al. kawas~…ē ****, s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari, kawas~…ē te ****, s~…ēquliq ka s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤aq qmol mari, nqu **-**-*-*, kawas~…ē qas~…ēa mzjup s~…ēqu nő≤a te qutux lańßuj. kawas~…ē te ****-****, pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ēqu mins~…ēiŇč, ** ő≤un qu na…£al nja, ** qnol nja mari(qas~…ēa …£a pzjaŇč pzjux na…£al na
